mapper.insert: Insert INTO question ( category, knowledge_point, difficulty, question_content, reference_answer, status ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{difficulty}, #{questionContent}, #{referenceAnswer}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, category, knowledge_point, difficulty, question_content, reference_answer, status, created_at, updated_at FROM question WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET category = #{category}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, question_content = #{questionContent}, reference_answer = #{referenceAnswer} WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: AND ( knowledge_point LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query.keyword},'%') OR question_content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query.keyword},'%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT id, category, knowledge_point, difficulty, question_content, status, updated_at FROM question
ORDER BY updated_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
